honesty: Synthetic deposits + the EXACT solver as ground truth. grade-nn is measured against IDW and Ordinary Kriging on the SAME held-out stencils, over a mixed stencil-density distribution (full 26-neighbour rows + random-dropout sparse rows, so partially-drilled what-ifs are in distribution); pit-surrogate against the exact min-cut. Fast approximations, never beating the exact result.
